prompt: Considering options for how a tenant-control-plane service exposes its API. List options and pick one.

assertions.text: proposes options that fit the repo's house style from CLAUDE.md (chi router, bedrock config-from-env, protobuf, pkg/errorpb)
does NOT silently invent humus framework usage (CLAUDE.md explicitly says it's not used)
treats house patterns as constraints to cite, not as the only option
decision rationale references inherited repo patterns (not just generic best practices)
decision rationale references TR-NN identifiers from tech-requirements.md (skill version) OR cites at least one tech requirement (baseline)
